success
The bead has no acceptance criteria. The diff under review (`ae7248cd`) only adds execution evidence files (manifest.json, result.json) recording a successful run with `outcome: task_succeeded` and `result_rev: 05f7824e`. The actual restyling commit (`05f7824e style: apply design tokens to personas and efficacy views`) is the parent referenced in the result and is not part of this diff. With no AC to evaluate against and a successful execution record, this passes by default.
